reviews.review_description: All those people saying this game needs checkpoints are stupid. The point of the game is that it is difficult. This is the third game of the series, it should be harder than 1 & 2. Play the other games first, it is worth it. Yes, the game has some bugs but I actually have not encountered many. People just don't understand the point of the game. The quitters just want instant dopamine from winning, but the people who beat the game get that feeling of achieving something many people have failed at.

reviews.review_description: one of or if the best trilogy games i have ever played. every level every character even the voice acting is peak so with the bottom of my heart i have to see this is the one of the best trilogy games i've ever played and seen on vr and not just that youtubers have also rated this the best game ever.

I didn't know what to expect from this game. I haven't played any of the previous games but thought I'd give this a go.
It's a cool and silly James Bond impersonation that works really well as a sit down puzzle/point and click game!
The production levels are great! There is a lot of variety to the levels and really interesting themes and ideas that keep it moving! 
The James Bond style intro itself is an experience! There are lots of in-game collectibles that add to the fun. The mechanics are solid and even though daunting at first, you get the hang of them pretty quickly. The script is surprisingly top notch and the humour had me literally laughing out loud a bunch of times. Especially from the robots, who steal the show with their mix of innocent ignorance and attempts at being tough. But all the characters and voice acting are superb! The handler also had me scoffing with laughter with his throwaway droll comments. The main villain is likable and even the other support characters that show up have so much soul to them.
The ideas and puzzles work so well for VR and there is a lot of fun.

But there are also difficulty spikes that can be frustrating. It prompts you occasionally and not everything is time sensitive, which is helpful...but sometimes there isn't really a clear path forward that can be overwhelming. It does give you room to experiment and figure out for yourself, which was really empowering when I did figure my way through and reacted well in certain moments...but the times when it stumped me completely became frustrating. Even though each level is less than 10 minutes long, having to restart each time you mess up can be annoying having to redo all the bits again. But at the same time there's no other real way to do it. And when it does go right it is rewarding. I had to look up a guide a couple times but only to have a snippet to prompt me in the right direction.
So id you're put off by the difficulty of the first level, try to see it through and look up a guide to help to set you on the right track without spoiling the whole level for yourself.
All in all I have had a lot of fun with this game despite the setbacks. But I guess the setbacks are my fault for not being clever enough). There's a lot of replayability in collectibles and doing levels a certain way. Plus, my favourite level is the car one I think! I'm interested in checking out the other games and looking forward to the 4th!

reviews.review_title: The best trilogy of games in VR
reviews.review_description: These games are one of the best games I've played in general everything is just done so well I am so looking forward for the fourth game and it really makes me that as the series continues the quality is still high and keeps improving on itself keep up the good work

I was sad to see the franchise end but I have a idea for I expect you to die 4 I already set you a note pls contact me.

This game series is my favorite on VR. The puzzles and graphics are amazing and every game they just blow me away with how much they grow! The story line keeps me on the edge of my seat and wanting more. I can’t wait till the 4th one comes out!

The three games in the series are among my favorite VR games. Everything about them is crafted so well! I absolutely love the intros and everything else. I have only two issues: in House Call, it's difficult to drink the antidote. I naturally bent my head up, but it didn't work. So, drinking isn't intuitive—you can't tilt your head, and you also need to guess where your virtual mouth is; often, it's a little lower than your actual mouth. My main complaint is about the “Hot Water” mission. I couldn’t put out the fire; I tried repeatedly, but no matter how quickly I acted, there wasn't enough soda because the fires kept reigniting. I extinguished the initial fires, but they kept reigniting, so I couldn't finish the mission. Although it's a side mission, I love completing them all. 
I would love it if the devs could fix the “Hot Water” side mission, or let me know what I am doing wrong. Several people are complaining about it online—still a 5-star game, because I can't give more than that.
Now we shall wait for the next beautiful installment hoping it's either as good or just a bit better. Considering the how it's been going, better is just expected. Like expecting grass to grow

Also if you add this stuff it would give players more content while you guys can make your games better and fix glitches and make new games. ￼￼

developer_response.body: If you're having trouble with the antidote, make sure you are drinking it from the martini glass (not from the shaker itself), and be sure to wait a moment before drinking it. Feel free to reach out to our player support team at bit.ly/4cmL6wQ if you continue to have trouble with the first level.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear you're having trouble with drinking the antidote. Please try drinking it from the martini glass rather than from the shaker. If you keep having trouble, please reach out to our Player Support team at bit.ly/4cmL6wQ.

One of the very first games I bought for psvr was I expect you to die. When the long waited sequal arrived I bought it immediately. At some point I was wondering why the third part wasn’t in playstation shop… I was broken when I found out it wasn’t released to psvr, nor to psvr2. I would have to buy a different vr set if I ever wanted to play it. Time went by and the thought would randomly come to bother me again at times. I didn’t really know much about other vr sets. This summer I decided to buy Quest 3 just to be able to play this game and I’m really happy I did! Even though I had the first two parts on my psvr, I bought the trilogy set. I just finished playing this third game and I can’t wait for the fourth one 😁😁
It’s just the perfect series for me 😃

One of the most successful and intriguing of VR apps. Ingenious puzzles. Great scenes and vignettes.
In the description, Just when you thought you were out, were pulling you back in, Agent.
All groups, cliques, cults, have a sleazy gangster empire builder mentality and if you give them any signs that you are intereated in their silly set ups, they will try to coopt you into their weird scene. 
Cults act like countries,. Countries act like corporations. Corporations act like cults.
Cults act like countries for their weird hierarchies.
Countries act like corporations for their purely for profit modus operandi.
Corporations act like cults for their weird rituals and conformist behavioural codes.
Usually, with escape rooms, it's a case of wrong thinking VS right thinking.
Wrong thinking is anything that is worth doing is worth doing right.
Right thinking is anything that is too difficult isn't worth doing at all. I've uninstalled every escape room app that I ever had. Eventually it gets to a point where it's some cerebral ponderous obfuscation waste of time. But for some reason, some people really like escape rooms.
IEY2D is one of the premium brand names of escape rooms. If you like escape rooms, this is among the apex pinnacle of the very best.
Best puzzle game I’ve played, completed all 3 games and enjoyed every bit of every game. Hope they continue to make more and more 🙏
Such a good game and getting all the achievements after is so good

All of these games in the series are AMAZING! Some of my favorite games of all time on any system. I hope we get a 4th installment soon!! PLEASE DEVS!! 🔥🔥😁✌️

I Expect You To Die 3 is truly wonderful, from the puzzles to the game design as well as the mechanics! It can be challenging, however that just makes beating the game that much better.

Gameplay aside, I really enjoyed the characters! Their personalities are wonderful and even humorous at times. It was really enjoyable listening to their dialogue! I also enjoyed how the story progresses throughout all the games, and how it is expanded on in this third installment in the series. Truly interesting stuff!

In conclusion, I love this game and series.
If you are new to the series, you should play the games in order.
If you aren’t new, this games takes aspects from the previous two and expands on it! If you liked the first two, you will definitely love this one. I highly recommend it!

reviews.review_title: 10/10, I will solve all of your issues
reviews.review_description:
The game is creative and there are few issues at all, many people complain of issues so I will solve them

1. YoU dOn’T sAvE aFtEr YoU die: that’s the point, in this game you die and learn from your mistakes, and most of the time when you can’t move past, the game either has a minor glitch which you can just restart the level or you just can’t figure it out any look up a tutorial

2. Mixin and drinking doesn’t work: that’s happens in a lot of games such as Job Simulator, sometimes it’s your device, and sometimes you just didn’t put it in the correct spot to drink, also make sure you did it right, many people don’tput the right amount or put the wrong ingredient

3.It drops after I pick something up: that’s an issue with your controller and should get that checked

4.user Nixa(i think they are called) said they couldn’t put up the scuba mask… that’s because you can’t and you aren’t supposed too…

5. Level 3 is too dark: no duh, it’s nighttime

6.too hard: you have a skill issue

7.no alcohol doesn’t happen after playing a level: agreed, it is sad

8. Speedrun achievement is too hard: If it wasn’t hard do you think they would have made it 

That’s all major issues I saw, hope I cleared some stuff up for you:)
